candidate_llm_application: Cross-layer attention-head triangulation for passive output-provenance + eigenvalue narrowband role classify

results.judge_justification: MDA traces interpretable-unit provenance back to training data via influence functions — analogous to passive sonar tracing source from listening signature. Different in that it targets TRAINING origin rather than IN-CONTEXT source token, but the provenance-attribution concept is shared.
Switch-feature analysis; intra-layer not cross-layer triangulation.

Automated Attention Pattern Discovery at Scale uses pattern fingerprinting across heads/layers to identify source-token roles — operationally the eigenvalue-narrowband-classification leg AND the cross-layer attention-pattern attribution.
Sparse attention masks for mech analysis; not specifically multi-layer triangulation.
Sparse attention post-training simplifies attribution graphs.
